# Open Source Legends - Sources and legal notes

This file records factual source URLs and portrait reference/legal notes. Production card text must come from `roster.locked.json`, not from image-model output.
The printer template PDF is used only as a page-size authority; guide artwork is not copied into the production PDFs.

## 001 - Richard Stallman

- Title: Founder of the GNU Project
- Known for: Advocate for free software movement
- Facts verified: yes
- Source URLs:
  - https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q7439
  - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Richard_Stallman
  - https://www.google.com/search?q=Richard%20Stallman%20open%20source
- Portrait reference URLs:
  - https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/38/Richard_Stallman_Bologna_2024_abc1.jpg/330px-Richard_Stallman_Bologna_2024_abc1.jpg
  - https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/3/38/Richard_Stallman_Bologna_2024_abc1.jpg
- Portrait review status: approved
- Legal notes: Portrait is an AI-generated illustration (OpenAI gpt-image-1), not a photograph. Facts grounded in public Wikipedia/Wikidata sources. Verify publicity/personality rights before commercial sale.
- Research candidate URLs from script:
  - https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q7439
  - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Richard_Stallman
  - https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/38/Richard_Stallman_Bologna_2024_abc1.jpg/330px-Richard_Stallman_Bologna_2024_abc1.jpg
